summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or PR-creation actions are planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr. Deterministic validation flagged #91211 as security-sensitive, so that exact PR is routed to central OpenClaw security handling while the unrelated non-security PRs remain non-mutating classifications.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with passing proof, but it still needs maintainer judgment and/or branch refresh before any landing path.

Related to the broader assistant-media download fix family, but not safe to close in this inventory shard because closeout is disabled and the overlapping canonical path is not a hydrated seed target.
The remaining decision is product/technical scope: whether the broader unmentioned-group typing suppression should land beyond the already-merged narrower fix.
Focused bug fix with passing proof, but the artifact shows waiting-on-author status and technical correctness/product behavior still require maintainer judgment.
Related provider/config compatibility work. It should stay open for the schema side unless a maintainer chooses the broader #90033 path; no close or fix action is allowed in this job.
Focused bug-fix PR with proof, but the linked issue's review did not complete and technical correctness needs maintainer review.
Larger diagnostics/API behavior change with waiting-on-author status; maintainer judgment is required before any closure or landing path.

Still related to an apparently real outbound message-delivery bug family, but failing proof/checks and partial overlap with merged #89601 make it unsuitable for closeout or merge planning in this job.
Focused bug fix with failed proof; maintainer/technical correctness review is required.
Quarantine #91211 for central OpenClaw security handling because the validator identified it as security-sensitive.
